acceptance_targets: [ch04_f06] PASS if no more than two scene-entry paragraphs in the chapter rely on smell-led opening syntax and revised entries still deliver concrete setting pressure. FAIL if the same smell-led pattern remains in three or more entry beats.

[ch04_f07] PASS if only one anaphora-heavy list pattern remains in the revised fallout section and at least one replaced block is converted into an enacted beat with character action. FAIL if both list chains remain substantially intact.

[ch04_f08] PASS if the revised span snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:327-351 includes at least three distinct focalizer interior markers tied to specific turns in the conversation. FAIL if the section remains mostly external line exchange.

[ch04_f09] PASS if the cited lines are revised into complete grammatical sentences and the chapter no longer relies on recurring verbless emphasis fragments in narrative prose. FAIL if three or more clipped fragment emphases remain.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than two scene-entry paragraphs in the chapter rely on smell-led opening syntax and revised entries still deliver concrete setting pressure. FAIL if the same smell-led pattern remains in three or more entry beats.
findings.problem: Recurring smell-led descriptive construction appears repeatedly across scene entries (more than twice), flattening texture through a single sensory template.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework at least two of the repeated sensory-entry paragraphs at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:180, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:300, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:437 to open through different vectors (movement, pressure, sound, or touch) rather than smell-first stacking.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if only one anaphora-heavy list pattern remains in the revised fallout section and at least one replaced block is converted into an enacted beat with character action. FAIL if both list chains remain substantially intact.
findings.problem: List-anaphora formula is over-reused in late chapter fallout (the repeated Some-chain, then repeated wanted-chain), creating mechanical rhetorical cadence instead of scene-driven movement.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress one of the list blocks at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:483-490 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:558-560 into dramatized action/reaction tied to a specific interaction, not category summaries.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:327-351 includes at least three distinct focalizer interior markers tied to specific turns in the conversation. FAIL if the section remains mostly external line exchange.
findings.problem: Interiority drought: a 10+ paragraph stretch in the secure-line exchange runs as external transcript/action with little to no focalizer thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment, creating screenplay drift.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:327-351, insert brief focalized interior beats (somatic response, judgment, or memory-flash) at leverage changes without slowing scene tempo.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the cited lines are revised into complete grammatical sentences and the chapter no longer relies on recurring verbless emphasis fragments in narrative prose. FAIL if three or more clipped fragment emphases remain.
findings.problem: Clipped fragment construction recurs as emphasis (more than twice), nudging narration toward elliptical shorthand and violating the constitution's anti-clipping constraint.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:164, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:534, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:544, convert fragment emphasis into grammatically complete sentences while preserving rhythm and tone.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when stakes demand it: show coercion mechanics, sexual negotiation, grief rituals, and financial desperation at scene level. In edge cases, prefer precision over decorum; protect character dignity through perspective accuracy, not by omitting the hard material.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene requires bodily, economic, or moral consequence and the draft retreats into abstract phrasing, rewrite with concrete action, sensation, and decision impact before proceeding.
aesthetic_risk_policy.operational_resolution_rule: When uncertain between tasteful distance and narrative truth, choose the version that preserves causal accountability and embodied consequence, then tune language for clarity rather than softness.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for deliberate emphasis, legal language, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter structures deliberately: high-density dialogue vs interior reflection, multi-scene public collision vs two-scene intimate pressure, aftermath inventory vs anticipatory dread. Never let two consecutive chapters share the same pacing architecture or turn mechanism.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsentimental literary diction that permits technical vocabulary, profanity, and class-marked speech without flattening idiolects.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person centered on Seo Ina, with brief controlled widenings in public-event chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternating pressure waves: compressed clauses in operational stress, longer breath-based lines in grief and reflection.
